title: Subfield Separator
text: Subfield Separator Character to be used as the separator between subfields. Description Note: The subfield separator used in the field interface and the field layout does not need to be the same. For the field interface, the default is GOLD ; (semicolon). For variable-length subfields, the separator is physically stored in the database. For fixed-length subfields, it is not. Applies to Modeled Field Syntax Modeled Field Layout Was this topic helpful?
